purpose: Reusable city and region research notes for Homes by Israel article creation. Each article still requires its own research pass, but verified city basics and source URLs should be reused from this database instead of being re-created from memory.
rules: Use official city, agency, school district, hospital, port, airport, or employer sources first.
Do not turn a city note into article copy without checking whether the specific article question requires additional sources.
Avoid unsupported commute-time, price, school-quality, safety, or ranking claims.
When a live article uses a city record, add its topicId to usedByTopicIds.
